prompt: Talk about something valuable you had as a child.
hindiPrompt: बचपन में आपके पास कोई मूल्यवान चीज़ थी, उसके बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: As a child, I had a bicycle that I loved very much. I also had many toys.
tips: Use 'I had' for each possession you mention.

prompt: Describe your old house or neighbourhood.
hindiPrompt: अपने पुराने घर या मोहल्ले का वर्णन करें।
sampleAnswer: My old house had three rooms. It had a small garden. The neighbourhood had friendly people.
tips: Use 'had' with singular and plural objects.

prompt: Tell about a famous person's possessions in the past.
hindiPrompt: किसी प्रसिद्ध व्यक्ति की पिछली संपत्तियों के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: Mahatma Gandhi had a simple lifestyle. He had only a few possessions.
tips: Use 'He had' or 'She had' for third person.

prompt: What did your school have that was special?
hindiPrompt: आपके स्कूल में कौन सी विशेष चीज़ें थीं?
sampleAnswer: My school had a big playground. It had a good library. We had excellent teachers.
tips: Use 'had' for past description of a place.

prompt: Talk about what your family had before you were born.
hindiPrompt: जन्म से पहले आपके परिवार के पास क्या था?
sampleAnswer: My grandfather said our family had a big farm. They had many cows and goats.

prompt: Describe what your old job or school had.
hindiPrompt: आपकी पुरानी नौकरी या स्कूल में क्या-क्या था?
sampleAnswer: My old company had a cafeteria. It had a gym too. We had a great team.
tips: Practice with different subjects: it had, we had.

prompt: What did your best friend have that you admired?
hindiPrompt: आपके सबसे अच्छे दोस्त के पास क्या था जो आपको पसंद था?
sampleAnswer: My best friend had a wonderful personality. He had great speaking skills.

prompt: Talk about a city or country that had something special.
hindiPrompt: किसी शहर या देश के बारे में बताएं जिसमें कुछ खास था।
sampleAnswer: Ancient Rome had a powerful army. It had beautiful architecture and roads.
tips: Use 'It had' or 'They had' for places.

prompt: Describe what you had in your bag/room as a student.
hindiPrompt: छात्र के रूप में आपके बैग/कमरे में क्या था?
sampleAnswer: As a student, I had many books in my bag. I had a notebook, a pen, and a ruler.

prompt: What qualities did a leader you know have?
hindiPrompt: आप जिस नेता को जानते हैं, उसमें क्या गुण थे?
sampleAnswer: Our principal had strong leadership. She had patience and wisdom. She had a vision for our school.
tips: Use 'She had' or 'He had' for qualities.
